attribute.label: Atributo derivado de la descripcion para ordenar
attribute.name: d_creador

attribute.label: Cantidad de CVs Asociados - Atributo calculable
attribute.name: e_cant_cv

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Carpetas.CARPETA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Carpetas.CARPETA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS27_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta) as CNT from POS27_CARPETAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS27_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS27_CARPETAS.d_carpeta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS27_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera las ultimas 5 Carpetas del Usuario logueado
resource.name: GET_MIS_CARPETAS

qry:select.name: qryGetMias
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' maxsize 5 SELECT CAR.oi_carpeta, CAR.d_carpeta, CAR.f_carpeta
FROM POS27_CARPETAS as CAR
WHERE CAR.oi_usuario_sistema = {$PARAM/@oi_usuario_sistema}
ORDER BY f_carpeta DESC
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recuepra las 5 carpetas mas recientemente creadas
resource.name: GET_CARPETAS_P

qry:select.name: qryCarpetasP
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' maxsize 5 SELECT CAR.oi_carpeta, CAR.d_carpeta, CAR.f_carpeta
FROM POS27_CARPETAS as CAR
ORDER BY f_carpeta desc ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATA PYC="1" order="asc" activeOrder="CCV" oi_usuario_sistema="" carpeta_like="" qryMode="LISTCAR"/>
resource.description: Recupera todas las carpetas para la lista general o todas las de un usuario. Tambien espera parametro para buscar carpeta por titulo
resource.name: GET_ALL

qry:select.name: qryGetAll
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Carpetas.CAR_CV.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Carpetas.CAR_CV.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR.oi_car_cv) as CNT from POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR.oi_car_cv={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR.d_car_cv,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR.oi_car_cv,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR.oi_carpeta={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATA PYC="1" oi_pedido="37498" c_marca="" oi_carpeta="253" order="asc" activeOrder="AN" qryMode="LISTCAR" l_leido="1" />
resource.description: Recupera todos los Cvs de la Carpeta parametro
resource.name: GET_CVS_CAR

qry:select.name: qryCarpeta
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CAR.oi_carpeta, CAR.f_carpeta, CAR.d_carpeta, CAR.oi_usuario_sistema, CAR.d_creador, CAR.e_cant_cv
FROM POS27_CARPETAS as CAR
WHERE CAR.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetCvs
qryExperienciaUltima
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ACV.oi_cv, ACV.d_empresa, ACV.f_egreso
FROM POS01_ANTEC_CV as ACV
WHERE ACV.oi_cv in ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
ORDER BY f_egreso asc
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryExperienciaActual
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ACV.oi_cv, ACV.d_empresa
FROM POS01_ANTEC_CV as ACV
WHERE isNull(ACV.f_egreso) AND ACV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryEstudioUltimo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT ECV.oi_cv, E.d_estudio, ECV.oi_nivel_estudio
FROM POS01_ESTUDIOS_CV as ECV, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as E
JOIN ECV.oi_estudio INNER E.oi_estudio
WHERE ECV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
ORDER BY oi_nivel_estudio ASC
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryEstudioActual
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT E.d_estudio, ECV.oi_cv
FROM POS01_ESTUDIOS_CV as ECV, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as E
JOIN ECV.oi_estudio INNER E.oi_estudio
WHERE ECV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%}) AND ECV.oi_nivel_estudio = 12
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryNotas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT N.oi_nota, N.oi_cv
FROM POS01_NOTAS_CV as N
WHERE N.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%})
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qryLectura
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT LCV.oi_cv_leido, LCV.oi_cv
FROM POS01_CV_LEIDO as LCV
WHERE LCV.oi_cv IN ({%=string($PARAM/ROW/@oi_cv)%}) AND LCV.oi_usuario_sistema = {$PROXY/@ETTY}
')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $PARAM/ROW join $r/@oi_cv inner $s/@oi_cv

qry:select.name: qrySexo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CV.c_sexo
FROM POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR as CARCV, POS01_CV as CV
JOIN CARCV.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv
WHERE CARCV.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryEdad
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CV.oi_cv, CV.edad
FROM POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR as CARCV, VW_BUSCAR_CV as CV
JOIN CARCV.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv
WHERE CARCV.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
GROUP BY CV.oi_cv, CV.edad
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryNivEst
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT NIVEST.d_nivel_estudio, COUNT(CARCV.oi_cv) as cant
FROM POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR as CARCV, POS01_CV as CV, PER12_NIVELES_EST as NIVEST
JOIN CARCV.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv, CV.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER NIVEST.oi_nivel_estudio
WHERE CARCV.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
GROUP BY NIVEST.d_nivel_estudio
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qrySalario
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT CV.n_remuneracion
FROM POS27_ASOCIA_CV_CAR as CARCV, POS01_CV as CV
JOIN CARCV.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv
WHERE
CV.n_remuneracion >0 AND CARCV.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
')/ROWS/ROW
